title: DummyPlayers
description: Paper plugin that allows players to create fake dummy players for AFK farms and chunk loading using NMS (Net Minecraft Server) integration.
body:
A Minecraft Paper plugin that allows players to create fake dummy players for AFK farms and chunk loading using NMS (Net Minecraft Server) integration.

**Features**

- **Fake ServerPlayer Entities**: Creates actual fake players that appear in tab list and game world
- **Configurable Limits**: Set maximum dummies per player (default: 1)
- **Chunk Loading**: Automatically keeps chunks loaded around dummies
- **Persistence**: Dummies persist across server restarts
- **Name Prefix**: Configurable display name prefix (default: "[AFK] ")
- **Player Synchronization**: New players joining see all existing dummies
- **Full NMS Integration**: Uses Minecraft internals for authentic player simulation
